curation_notes: Primary locations are the patch_in_place and merge_in_place functions in tremor-script/src/interpreter/expr.rs. These functions use unsafe mem::transmute to convert an immutable Cow reference to a mutable reference, then perform patch/merge operations that insert event-lifetime values into persistent state. When the event is freed, these references become dangling. The patch removes both functions entirely and also removes the PatchInPlace/MergeInPlace AST variants from ast.rs, base_expr.rs, raw.rs, and to_static.rs, and updates run.rs for proper state threading. Six non-test source files were changed, making this a noisy patch. No sibling files share this pattern as the in-place optimization was unique to expr.rs. Vulnerability class use-after-free confirmed from CWE-416 and the unsafe transmute pattern in the diff.
